items.title: UAE condemns Iran's 'brazen' attack on tankers as US launches fresh strikes
items.summary: The third consecutive night of US strikes on Iran came as Trump announced a 20% charge as part of a new blockade on the strait.

items.title: ''There was no way to get out': Witnesses describe how deadly inferno swept through Bangkok bar
items.summary: A musician who was performing when the fire broke out says he crawled for the exit - and was thrown from the bar when something exploded.

items.title: Briton tells of surviving Spain wildfire in car as wife and friends died trying to run to safety
items.summary: Malcolm Timbrell's wife and their friends are thought to have died when a devastating wildfire tore through their village in Spain.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 中國工程師在東京開白牌車被捕 姓名「寧萌」曝光全網熱議
items.summary: 居住在日本東京都港區的中國籍42歲系統工程師，10日下午5時許開白牌車在東京車站外違法載客時遭警方逮捕，隨著其中文姓名「寧萌」曝光後引起網友廣泛關注。  據《日本新聞網》報導...…

items.title: 川普擬向荷姆茲海峽貨物收費 巴西總統狠批「海盜行為」
items.summary: 美國總統川普13日表示，將恢復對伊朗海上封鎖，同時對通行荷姆茲海峽的貨物收取20%費用。對此巴西總統魯拉（Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva）稱，美國擬向通過該...…

items.title: 慘！日本秋田民宅火災夫婦疑雙亡 無業兒涉嫌縱火被捕
items.summary: 人倫慘劇！日本秋田縣仁賀保市象潟町1棟民宅，13日早上7時許遭惡火燒毀，屋內發現2具遺體，可能是居住在裡面的老夫老妻，而夫婦倆的44歲無業兒子山下廣攝涉嫌縱火被捕。  據《N...…
